title: helichrysum elliotii
intro: Helichrysum elliotii, also known as the Elliot's Everlast or Yellow Everlast, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is native to the Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal provinces in South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being, including reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia.
